title: oxalis taiwanensis
intro: Oxalis taiwanensis, also known as the Taiwan oxalis or Taiwanese wood sorrel, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its rich content of vitamins and minerals. Oxalis taiwanensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
